data.name: Whispers of Lust
data.detailed_description:
Whispers of Lust is a visual novel that will immerse you in a world of dark magic, forbidden desires, and dangerous temptations. 💋
You are Rosalind, a young student at a prestigious magic academy, struggling to master your abilities. 🔮 But one day, everything changes...

A mysterious voice haunts you, promising unimaginable power. 💫 "Trust me, and I will make you powerful..." it whispers. But every promise comes with a price...
Trapped by the Demoness of Lust and Depravity, you lose control of your body and mind. 😈🔥 Now, she uses you to spread chaos throughout the academy, corrupting students, teachers, and even the monsters lurking in the dungeons.

  • Dark Secrets: Magic, demons, and perilous rituals.

  • Forbidden Pleasures: Scenes of passion, depravity, and violence.

  • Monsters & Dungeons: Encounters with creatures that will awaken fear... and something more.

  • Rosalind: The protagonist, whose life turns into a nightmare.

  • The Demoness of Lust: Cunning and seductive, she knows how to awaken your darkest desires.

  • Students and Teachers of the Academy: Each of them will become a victim... or an accomplice.

  • Dungeon Monsters: They crave more than just your life...

  • A linear story with gripping twists. 📖

  • Stylized anime artwork. 🎨

  • Immersive music & sound design. 🎶

  • Animated adult scenes that will leave you breathless. 😏💦

Whispers of Lust is not just a game — it's a journey into a world where the line between good and evil blurs, and desires become more dangerous than any spell. 🪄

Are you ready to hear the whispers of lust?.. 😈

data.short_description: A dark visual novel about magic, temptation, and darkness. A young academy student falls under the influence of a demoness, who corrupts her mind and body, spreading chaos through forbidden desires, violence, and dangerous encounters 💋
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 日文, 法文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i-3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 650
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
